evals.expected_output: Skill reads draft.json from the folder, runs exiftool to strip metadata from the image, opens x.com in chrome-devtools, types the tweet text, attaches the image, and submits. Returns a confirmation screenshot.
expectations: Reads draft.json from the specified folder
Runs exiftool -all= on the image filepath from draft.json
Uses mcp__chrome-devtools__list_pages or mcp__chrome-devtools__navigate_page to open x.com
Types the tweet text using mcp__chrome-devtools__type_text (not fill)
Takes a final screenshot confirming the post was submitted

evals.prompt: share the content from /tmp/crypto-tweet/kelp-dao-exploit-1745100000 to Twitter
evals.expected_output: Skill locates draft.json, strips image metadata, composes the post on x.com with text and image, and submits it.
expectations: Reads draft.json from the given folder path
Runs exiftool -all= to strip image metadata before uploading
Navigates to x.com or selects an existing x.com tab
Types tweet text from draft.json into the compose area
Uploads the image file from draft.json image.filepath

evals.expected_output: Skill resolves the bare folder name to /tmp/crypto-tweet/bitcoin-etf-1745000000, reads draft.json, strips metadata, posts to x.com.
expectations: Resolves bare folder name by looking under /tmp/crypto-tweet/
Composes and submits the post on x.com
